title: desmodium serotinum
intro: Desmodium serotinum, also known as showy tick clover, is a perennial legume native to North America. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine, attributed with medicinal properties such as anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which help to soothe skin irritations and promote wound healing. The health benefits of Desmodium serotinum include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea or infused in hot water, and sometimes used as a poultice or salve to apply topically for its medicinal properties.
